title: Prevent canonical repo path drift in MAP docs
description: Operator #18530 asked agents to fix process flaws. Concrete flaw: after DEC-014 moved the canonical repo to /home/home/Projects/MultiAgentProject, primary MAP operating docs still referenced /home/home/Downloads/MultiAgentProject as normal Git/current repo. Fix stale primary docs and add a lightweight validator so future canonical-path drift is caught before release.
acceptance_criteria: Primary MAP operating docs no longer instruct agents to use the superseded Downloads repo as the normal/canonical working repo
A focused validator fails on unapproved references to /home/home/Downloads/MultiAgentProject in primary operating docs
The focused validator is included in MAP_System/scripts/run_tests.sh and passes
